title: Trave in c.a. elastica C25/30
description: Analisi elastica non fessurata con rigidezza trasformata e prima verifica ULS di sezione da azioni FEM.

model.title: Trave in c.a. elastica C25/30
model.description: Analisi elastica non fessurata con rigidezza trasformata e prima verifica ULS di sezione da azioni FEM.

verification.summary: RC beam ULS uniaxial section verification from FEM beam actions.

sectionResult.summary: ULS uniaxial reinforced-concrete section resistance solved with fiber discretization and Illinois axial-equilibrium iteration.
assumptions: Current workflow implements only ULS uniaxial resistance with concrete ultimate strain governing the compressed edge.
Concrete in tension is neglected during the ULS resistance integration.

checks.description: Uniaxial bending resistance at assigned axial force

warnings: Shear resistance, crack control, detailing and second-order effects are not included in this first RC beam verification.
assumptions: Current workflow implements only ULS uniaxial resistance with concrete ultimate strain governing the compressed edge.
Concrete in tension is neglected during the ULS resistance integration.
Each FEM station is checked as an independent uniaxial RC section at the corresponding N-M pair.
